## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Marcel Santilli and Jason Gong to discuss Jason's potential role at Growth X and the company's strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X is experiencing rapid growth, closing deals and a Series A round](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [The company is actively hiring and poaching talent from other agencies](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Key challenges: building capacity, automating processes, and diversifying services beyond SEO](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Jason's potential role would focus on building leverage, productizing services, and strategic growth](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Growth X's Current State

  - [Closed Series A funding round; money to be wired soon](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Experiencing rapid growth: closed multiple deals this week](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Actively hiring: 2 managing directors, managing editors, writers, editors, production staff](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Current services: tutorial programmatic, link building, some AI outbound and content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### Operational Challenges and Strategies

  - [P0 (highest priority): Building capacity to keep up with growth](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Hiring managing editors has significantly improved quality and processes](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Aiming for 1 managing director per 2-3 pods, each pod handling \~5 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Goal: 80% gross margin by next year through economies of scale](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Need to systematize finding the right strategies and thinking creatively about solutions](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Automation and Productization

  - [Exploring AI-driven solutions: e.g., generating brand-specific illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Aim to automate more processes, especially in the "bottom layer" of production](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Considering productizing certain services or tools for additional revenue streams](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Example: Daniel's work on AI-generated illustrations matching client brand styles](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

### Strategic Growth and Diversification

  - [Looking to diversify beyond SEO to mitigate risk](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Exploring international expansion and localization](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Considering enterprise-level deals ($3-5 million)](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Potential for spinning out new businesses or products under a larger umbrella](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

### Jason's Potential Role

  - [Focus on building leverage in the business](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Help with productizing services and bringing a product mindset](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Potential involvement in growth strategies and external advocacy](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Exact title and responsibilities to be determined, with flexibility based on needs and strengths](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to consider potential titles that offer flexibility and external advantage](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - Further discussion on compensation structure
  - [Clarify the organizational structure and Jason's potential place within it](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Aim to close the loop on discussions by the following day](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Marcel to text Jason to continue the conversation offline](https://fathom.video/share/q2XJX9d24NspyDwV92T-dGTb2BWviyfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
